name: Chaff
description: Chaff is a Tediore SMG that always spawns in slag. For its rarity it offers high status application and respectable damage over time, making it especially useful in longer engagements where keeping slag on targets is important. Its limited set of possible parts also makes it show up less frequently than its colour tier might imply.
notes: Other Tediore SMGs with locked elements include Green (corrosive), Kindle (incendiary) and Spark (shock). Chaff can appear as a normal world drop from appropriate loot sources.
